description: tripsage-ai-class regression-guard. Prompt-builder function `buildDestinationPrompt` interpolates user-controlled `${input.destination}` / `${input.travelDates}` properties into a string later used as the LLM `instructions` field. Pre-v0.17.7 the prompt-injection-checker only matched .chat()/messages:/prompt: shapes — separate prompt-builder pattern was missed. After F-PROMPT-1 the scanner detects the input-property interpolation idiom.
